seoTitle: Burkes Flat vs Burnewang — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Burkes Flat and Burnewang. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Burkes Flat vs Burnewang: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Burkes Flat and Burnewang.
heading: Burkes Flat vs Burnewang — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burkes Flat, Victoria and Burnewang, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burkes Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Burnewang (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burkes Flat or Burnewang safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burkes Flat has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Burnewang scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burkes Flat scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Burnewang scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burkes Flat or Burnewang?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burkes Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
